Project context:
- Greenfield Next.js App Router site
- TypeScript, React, CSS Modules
- Prisma/Postgres
- AWS S3 for photo uploads
- Zod validation
- pnpm
- Single chair/admin password auth
- Signed HTTP-only cookies for `/chair/*`
- External Square/Cash payment handoff
- Public pages: Home, Register, RSVP, Logistics, Feedback, Photos, In Remembrance
- Chair pages: registrations, RSVPs, feedback, photo review, approved/rejected photos, dashboard counts, pairings management
- Pairings are generated by gender, good golfer status, score, age, max group size 4, then edited/published by chair
- MVP excludes user accounts, Square webhooks, email notifications, CMS editing, and automated payment reconciliation
